<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Boho Flower Crown](13-boho-crown.jpg)

For the bride who'd rather not carry anything down the aisle. Lightweight wire base, dried rosebuds, fresh chamomile, dusty miller — built to your head measurement so it doesn't fall mid-ceremony.

## What's in it

- Dried small rosebuds
- Fresh chamomile
- Dried lavender
- Dusty miller leaves

## Care

Don't touch the chamomile flowers more than necessary — they bruise. Store in a cool dry place until ready to wear.
